event: Fireplace with putti, dolphins and sea monsters
symbols: putti on the frieze — classical motifs of divine attendants and celestial joy
dolphins — ancient symbol of safe passage, salvation, and guidance across water
sea monsters — the chaos of the deep, the untamed forces of nature
central medallion portrait — commemoration and honor of a patron or classical figure
urns and garlands — themes of mortality, abundance, and ritual offering
description: A detailed architectural etching depicting an ornate fireplace surround in classical style. The mantelpiece features a frieze across the top populated with putti in various active poses. Below the frieze, elaborately carved pilasters flank the firebox, decorated with cascading floral garlands, urns, dolphins, and grotesque sea creatures. A central medallion with a portrait bust sits above the firebox opening. Inside the firebox, an elaborate fire grate or screen displays further decorative elements including winged figures, shields, and classical ornamental motifs.

_meta.title: Fireplace with putti, dolphins and sea monsters
